Journal.Title: Journal of strength and conditioning research

Article.ArticleTitle: Does the Method Matter? Examining How Specific Educational Approaches Shape Sleep Education Outcomes in High-Level Adolescent Athletes.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Laboratory Sport, Expertise and Performance (EA 7370), French Institute of Sport (INSEP), Paris, France.
